name: code_for_me
description: Prompt-driven repository task run. Omitted or `default` `responseMode` uses bundled `caveman-full`; set `off` for normal prose.

name: code_review
description: Runs the code-review workflow using repo + either branch or prNumber context. Omitted or `default` `responseMode` uses bundled `caveman-full`; set `off` for normal prose.
